info.title: MAIDAR
info.description: Human Risk Intelligence Platform - Scenario-aware, explainable, deterministic risk scoring

get.description: Root endpoint - health check.
Health check endpoint.

post.description:
Register a new user.

- If tenant_id is provided, adds user to existing tenant
- If organization_name is provided, creates new tenant and user becomes TENANT_ADMIN
- First user without tenant_id becomes PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN

Login with email and password to get JWT access token.

Rate limited to 5 attempts per 5 minutes per IP.

Verify email address using verification token or code.

Supports both:
- Token-based verification (from email link)
- Code-based verification (6-digit code)

schema.title: Response Verify Email Api V1 Auth Verify Email Post

post.description: Resend verification email with new code.

schema.title: Response Resend Verification Api V1 Auth Resend Verification Post

post.description:
Request password reset email.

Rate limited to 3 attempts per hour per IP.

schema.title: Response Forgot Password Api V1 Auth Forgot Password Post

post.description: Reset password using reset token from email.

schema.title: Response Reset Password Api V1 Auth Reset Password Post

get.description: Get current authenticated user's profile.

post.description: Change password for authenticated user.

schema.title: Response Change Password Api V1 Auth Change Password Post

post.description:
Calculate risk score for an employee-scenario pair.

This endpoint:
1. Fetches employee and scenario from database
2. Calculates risk using the MAIDAR risk engine
3. Optionally saves the result to database
4. Returns full explainability breakdown

**Deterministic**: Same inputs always produce same outputs.
**Explainable**: Includes breakdown of likelihood and impact components.
**Scenario-aware**: Risk varies based on scenario type.

Calculate risk scores for multiple employee-scenario pairs in bulk.

Efficient for calculating risk across:
- All employees for a specific scenario
- All scenarios for a specific employee
- Multiple combinations

Returns list of risk scores with full explainability.

schema.title: Response Calculate Risk Bulk Api V1 Risk Calculate Bulk Post

get.description:
Get all calculated risk scores for a specific employee across all scenarios.

Useful for:
- Employee risk profile view
- Comparing vulnerability across scenario types
- Historical risk tracking

schema.title: Response Get Employee Risk Scores Api V1 Risk Employee  Employee Id  Get

get.description:
Get all calculated risk scores for a specific scenario across all employees.

Useful for:
- Identifying highest-risk employees for a scenario
- Planning targeted simulations
- Risk distribution analysis

schema.title: Response Get Scenario Risk Scores Api V1 Risk Scenario  Scenario Id  Get

post.description:
Create a new employee.

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

get.description: Get employee statistics for the current tenant.
Get employee by ID (UUID or employee_id).

put.description:
Update employee by ID.

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

delete.description:
Delete employee (soft delete).

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

post.description: Search and filter employees with pagination.

Bulk import employees from JSON.

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

Upload CSV file to bulk import employees.

CSV format:
employee_id,email,full_name,age_range,gender,languages,technical_literacy,seniority,department,job_title

Example:
EMP001,john@example.com,John Doe,35_44,male,"en,ar",7,senior,IT,Software Engineer

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

Get risk trend analysis over time.

Shows how risk scores have changed over the specified date range.

get.description:
Compare risk across all departments.

Identifies highest and lowest risk departments.

Compare risk across seniority levels.

Shows which seniority levels are most vulnerable.

Get top vulnerable employees.

Identifies employees with highest risk scores or most concerning simulation behavior.

Get risk score distribution across all employees.

Shows how many employees fall into each risk band.

Get executive summary report.

High-level overview for leadership with key findings and recommendations.

post.description:
Export data to CSV or JSON.

Requires admin privileges. Supports exporting employees, simulations, scenarios, risk scores, and audit logs.

Create a new phishing scenario.

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

get.description: Get scenario statistics for the current tenant.
Get scenario by ID.

put.description:
Update scenario by ID.

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

delete.description:
Delete scenario (hard delete - only if not used in simulations).

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

post.description: Search and filter scenarios with pagination.

Create a new simulation campaign.

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

get.description: Get simulation by ID.

put.description:
Update simulation (limited fields, only for draft/scheduled simulations).

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

delete.description:
Cancel/delete simulation (can only delete draft simulations, others are cancelled).

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

post.description: Search and filter simulations with pagination.

Launch a simulation (send phishing emails to targets).

Requires TENANT_ADMIN or PLATFORM_SUPER_ADMIN role.

Track email engagement event (open, click, submit).

Public endpoint (no authentication required) - uses unique tracking tokens.

get.description: Get simulation results with pagination.
Get simulation statistics (engagement metrics).

post.description: Create a new tenant organization.

get.description: Get a specific tenant by ID.

post.description: Search tenants with filters and pagination.
Suspend a tenant.
Activate a suspended tenant.
Create a new admin user for a tenant.

get.description: Get a specific admin user by ID.

post.description: Search admin users with filters and pagination.
Suspend an admin user.
Activate a suspended admin user.

put.description: Reassign an admin user to a different tenant.

post.description: Search audit logs with filters and pagination.

get.description: Get a specific audit log entry by ID.
